title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: Explore the wonderous aspects of Canary pine, a tree that is capable of growing on top of volcanic cones, between rocks and ashes.

title: Surviving Australia
subTitle: Survivors and experts share tales of Australia's deadly beaches and dangerous waters.

title: Surviving Australia
subTitle: Venturing into Australia's wild reveals nature's beauty and challenges.

title: Surviving Australia
subTitle: Australia's suburbs conceal threats from wildlife and extreme weather.

title: Surviving Australia
subTitle: Meet survivors who have been lost in the wilderness, trapped underground or buried by landslides.

title: Aussie Snake Wranglers
subTitle: An elusive red-bellied black snake wanders on the outskirts of Sydney as a coastal carpet python struggles inside a drainpipe.

title: Aussie Snake Wranglers
subTitle: Experts encounter life-threatening situations as they try to catch some of the world's deadliest snakes hiding in Australian homes.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: For years Jeremy Wade has hunted a legendary Amazon giant which the locals call the Lau-Lau, a creature said to swallow men whole, but Wade won't come back without one.

title: Elephants Up Close
subTitle: The elephants of Africa are giants, with more than 130,000 of these animals located in Botswana. However, despite their size, they are sensitive, helpful and gentle creatures.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: The host, a biologist who is an extreme angler, explores freshwater mysteries and local folklore, to debunk fascinating myths and track down harrowing tales.

title: China's Wild Secrets
subTitle: Spanning five of China's hidden wildlife havens, exploring some of the world's most diverse ecosystems. From lush rainforests to soaring mountains, we uncover never-before-seen animal behaviours.

title: San Diego: America's Wildest City
subTitle: Experiencing the hidden wonders of San Diego, where humans and wildlife coexist in the country's most biodiverse urban landscape.

title: Extreme Africa
subTitle: South Africa's Drakensberg is home to sharp climatic and ecological gradients as physical conditions change for both land-based creatures and the raptors that swirl in the skies above.

title: Extreme Africa
subTitle: Tanzania's towering northern mountains, formed by ancient volcanoes, provide diverse habitats and hold water in its great centerpiece even during the driest times.

title: Extreme Africa
subTitle: Simien Mountains National Park in Ethiopia is home to some of the rarest creatures on earth like the grass-grazing Geladas, elusive Simien wolves and horned Walia ibex.

title: Extreme Africa
subTitle: The Southern Drylands are spectacular yet treacherously arid places, harboring an array of incredibly resilient creatures.

title: Creative Killers
subTitle: The filmmaker reveals the cunning and ingenious techniques used by various wild animals to hunt, eat and survive in their natural habitats.

title: Elephants Up Close
subTitle: The elephants of Africa are giants, with more than 130,000 of these animals located in Botswana. However, despite their size, they are sensitive, helpful and gentle creatures.

title: Elephants Up Close
subTitle: African elephants are skilled at locating water sources and sharing information with their herd, an ability crucial for survival in the wild.

title: Africa's Hunters
subTitle: Kamuti, a senior female leopard ruling a prime Luangwa Valley territory for decades, now faces challenges threatening her reign.

title: A Wolf's Journey
subTitle: Abandoned by his pack, Slava, a young wolf, embarks on a journey to survive in a human-dominated world, searching for a new territory and a new family as he travels across Europe.

title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: Oak trees are excellent nurturers of a wide array of flora and fauna such as the imperial eagle, deer, wild boars and cranes that thrive in southern Europe and North Africa.
